name: Tamboran Resources Corporation
analysis: TBN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 25% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2550, stop A$0.2252, target A$0.3385 (2.81:1) — then trail it.
